message:
fr-conformance: extend FR-P2C-006 WAIT/WAITAOF argument-validation fixture coverage (bd-19a4)

Why:
- Runtime now enforces WAIT/WAITAOF arity and non-negative integer argument contracts.
- Packet-006 fixture previously covered only success-path WAIT/WAITAOF semantics.

What changed:
- Added explicit negative-path conformance cases to `crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/fr_p2c_006_replication_journey.json`:
  - `WAIT -1 0` => integer-range error
  - `WAITAOF 1 0` => wrong-arity error
  - `WAITAOF 1 nope 0` => integer-range error
- Shifted downstream `now_ms` values to preserve deterministic ordering.

Validation:
- `rch exec -- cargo test -p fr-conformance -- --nocapture`
- `ubs crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/fr_p2c_006_replication_journey.json`

Traceability:
- Bead: bd-19a4
- Mail thread: br-19a4
